creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update devel/log4cxx from version 0.9.7 to 0.10.0, which allows further porting of the Robot Operating System ( http://www.ros.org/ ) to FreeBSD

* add build dependency on devel/apr
* clean up Makefile
* remove all patches in files/, now obsolete
* invoke autogen.sh from WRKSRC to get a working configure script

Tested on 8.0-RELEASE-i386 (port test), 6.4-STABLE-i386 (tinderbox, log at http://rene-ladan.nl/tb/logs/6-FreeBSD/log4cxx-0.10.0.log )

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
